brand_dna.category: Fine jewelry - handmade 14k gold rings, necklaces, and charms with gemstones and colorful enamel, sold as customizable, meaning-driven statement pieces.
brand_dna.core_belief: Jewelry is a canvas for self-expression: 'kWIT is a canvas on which you can paint your spirit, share your heart and adorn your voice.'
proof_points: Handmade in New York City and customized per order (refund policy)
14k yellow and rose gold with natural precious and semiprecious gemstones (product pages)
Reclaims and upcycles existing jewelry, metals, diamonds and gemstones into new pieces (about page)
Design Your Own service plus the ability to customize the 4 C's of a diamond center stone (site nav, Disco Ring page)
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, playful, and personal - artistic fine jewelry with real gold and gemstones that carries meaning, not mass-market minimalism.

voice_pillars.name: Witty and Personal
voice_pillars.desc: Writes with a spirited, expressive tone that treats each piece as an extension of the wearer's identity.
voice_pillars.quote: jewelry as witty and unique as you are

voice_pillars.name: Meaning-Infused
voice_pillars.desc: Ties every piece to intention, energy, and symbolism rather than just looks.
voice_pillars.quote: Each ring is infused with intention, designed to move with your energy, your rhythm, your mood.

voice_pillars.name: Bold Yet Wearable
voice_pillars.desc: Frames pieces as statement-making but easy to live in every day.
voice_pillars.quote: Bold yet effortless. Statement-making yet endlessly wearable.

voice_pillars.name: Playfully Glamorous
voice_pillars.desc: Leans into fun, sparkle, and a sense of occasion in product descriptions.
voice_pillars.quote: Do you feel like dancing? The Disco Ring is a mirrorball of diamonds

phrases: designed to move with your energy, your rhythm, your mood
paint your spirit, share your heart and adorn your voice
a mirrorball of diamonds sure to get your groove on
a timeless symbol of protection and elegance

icp: Design-conscious women who see jewelry as personal expression and are willing to invest in handmade, meaningful 14k gold pieces they can customize and keep for life.

personas.name: The Intentional Collector
personas.description: Buys jewelry for symbolism and energy, moved by talisman, birthstone, and 'infused with intention' storytelling.

personas.name: The Statement Maker
personas.description: Wants pieces that steal the show, drawn to bold, sparkling, celebrity-spotted designs framed as 'power neutrals'.

personas.name: The Legacy Upcycler
personas.description: Has treasured heirloom jewels and responds to the Design Your Own and reclaim-and-reinvent angle that preserves legacy with new meaning.

products_ladder.title: Ripple Effect Ring - Set of five bands

offers: Design Your Own custom jewelry service
Upcycle your own jewels into a new piece
FedEx 2-day insured shipping with tracking on all orders
In stock items ship within 1 week; made to order within 3 weeks (up to 4-6 weeks for some pieces)
All sales final - handmade and customized to order

allowed.claim: Made with 14k yellow and rose gold and natural gemstones
Reclaims and upcycles existing jewelry, metals, diamonds and gemstones into new designs
Customizable, including the 4 C's of the diamond center stone
Year Necklace uses 0.35 - 0.40 ctw natural marquee bezel-set gemstones

banned.claim: Calling the pieces 'sustainable' or 'eco-friendly' because they use reclaimed materials
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim without specific, verifiable backing
FTC Green Guides - unqualified/absolute recycled and impact claims not substantiated on site
FTC Green Guides - carbon neutral claim without verifiable proof
Medical/health claim - crystal energy language must stay non-medical

banned.claim: Aquamarine 'clears emotional weight' as a stated medical or psychological benefit
banned.why: Health claim - keep as poetic brand voice, not a provable treatment claim in ads
